test_cases.summary: Regression: Standard Cost Purchase Requisition - 137 PO Conversion

description.scenario: Verify that standard cost purchase requisitions continue to flow through BPMS015 without interruption, ensuring the change request does not break existing functionality.
description.expected_result: Cost purchase requisition approved and converted to 137 series PO successfully

steps.action: Go to Purchase requisition session (tdpur2600m000) and click new. Maintain header with buyer and business agreement -> PRQ header created
Create new requisition line. Input cost item (ZZZCST), quantity, price, confirmed receipt date, business partner, pegging information (Project and Activity). Save -> Requisition line created
Click on Actions and submit PRQ for approval -> PRQ submitted for approval
Check email inbox for buyer review email. Go to Bizagi and input case number from email -> Bizagi case opened
Open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next -> Buyer Review completed. Case sent for DOA approval
Complete DOA approval. Refresh Bizagi case and verify case completed with no outstanding actions -> BPMS015 case completed
Go back to Infor LN and refresh purchase requisition screen. Verify PRQ status is Approved -> PRQ status is Approved
Go to Bizagi and create a BWQ (BPMS002.1) case. Select buyer, tick purchase requisition tick box, click next -> BWQ case created
Select the purchase requisition with correct number. Select transfer against that record, click next -> Transfer initiated
Refresh the Bizagi case and verify completed with no actions remaining -> BWQ case completed
Go back to Infor LN and refresh PRQ. Verify status is Converted. Click requisition line > References > Linked Requisition Line Data (tdpur2502s000) -> PRQ converted. 137 PO number displayed
Open purchase order from (tdpur4100m000). Maintain and submit PO for approval -> PO submitted for approval
Complete DOA and supplier response. Open PO in Bizagi BPMS016, complete supplier response ACC -> PO is approved

test_cases.summary: Functional: Subcontracted Requisition Missing Peg/GI Information

description.scenario: Verify that BPMS015 now auto-rejects subcontracted purchase requisitions that lack pegging or GI information, preventing invalid data from progressing.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition auto-rejected by BPMS015 due to missing peg/GI info. Rejection email received.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with subcontracted item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL -> PRQ created
Ensure pegging and GI information fields are blank or missing for the requisition line -> Peg/GI information confirmed missing
Submit PRQ for approval -> Submitted for approval. BPMS015 triggered
BPMS015 performs auto-rejection check. Requisition is auto-rejected due to missing Peg/GI information -> BPMS015 case rejected
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to PEG/GI info missing -> Rejection email received with reason

test_cases.summary: Functional: Subcontracted Requisition Blank BP or Employee Supplier

description.scenario: Verify that BPMS015 rejects subcontracted requisitions where the business partner field is blank or contains an employee supplier after buyer review.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected by BPMS015 due to blank BP or Employee supplier. Rejection email received.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with subcontracted item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-VALVE
Maintain header and line details but leave Business Partner field blank -> BP field confirmed blank
Submit PRQ for approval -> Submitted for approval. Buyer review email received
Go to Bizagi and open buyer review case. Select RFx required as No, Buyer review completed as Yes. Save and press Next -> Buyer Review completed
BPMS015 performs validation check on Business Partner field. Requisition is rejected due to blank BP -> BPMS015 case rejected
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to missing Business Partner -> Rejection email received with reason

test_cases.summary: Functional: SubConDefault Items Not Linked to Production Orders

description.scenario: Verify that BPMS015 rejects subcontracted requisitions using default items (SubConDefault) that are not linked to active production orders.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected by BPMS015 due to SubConDefault item not linked to production order. Rejection email received.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with subcontracted item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-DEFAULT
Ensure no corresponding production order exists in tisfc0501m000 for this item -> Production order link confirmed missing
Submit PRQ for approval -> Submitted for approval. BPMS015 triggered
BPMS015 performs validation check on production order linkage. Requisition is rejected due to missing link -> BPMS015 case rejected
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to SubConDefault item not linked -> Rejection email received with reason

test_cases.summary: Functional: Multi-line Requisition with Subcontracted Items

description.scenario: Verify that BPMS015 rejects multi-line purchase requisitions containing subcontracted items, regardless of other line validity.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected by BPMS015 due to multi-line requisition containing subcontracted items. Rejection email received.

steps.action: Create new purchase requisition with multiple lines -> PRQ header created
Add first line with standard cost item ZZZCST and save -> First line created
Add second line with subcontracted item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-MIXED and save -> Second line created
Submit PRQ for approval -> Submitted for approval. BPMS015 triggered
BPMS015 performs validation check on multi-line structure containing subcontracted items. Requisition is rejected -> BPMS015 case rejected
Check email inbox for rejection notification stating purchase requisition rejected due to multi-line with subcontracted items -> Rejection email received with reason
